headline: Berkshire’s Greg Abel Marks His First Annual Meeting as CEO. We’d Give Him a B-Plus.
summary: The conglomerate’s stock is down 6% this year, with the Class A shares finishing Friday trailing the S&P 500 by 11 percentage points.

headline: Anchor Loads Up Invesco BulletShares 2029 Corporate Bond ETF With 1.1 Million Shares Bought
summary: Invesco BulletShares 2029 Corporate Bond ETF targets investment-grade U.S. corporate bonds maturing in 2029 with a defined maturity profile.

headline: PayPal's Epic Fall In Numbers
summary: PayPal has transitioned from a high-growth Wall Street darling to a value stock with stagnant user and revenue growth. Read the latest analysis on PYPL stock here.
